description_long: This is a tall, round wooden stool with a simple, minimalist design. The seat is circular and flat, with a smooth, slightly beveled edge. Three slender, evenly spaced legs extend downward from the seat, angling outward for stability. Two horizontal support bars connect the legs, one set higher and one set lower, reinforcing the structure and providing a place to rest feet. The wood grain is visible, giving the stool a natural, matte finish. There are no decorative elements or upholstery, emphasizing its functional and modern aesthetic.
description: A tall, round wooden stool with three angled legs and two horizontal support bars, featuring a smooth, natural finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular seat, three angled legs, and both horizontal support bars clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the seat's edge and the spacing between the legs.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to view 1, with the seat and leg arrangement visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Back view showing the same features as the front, with the support bars and leg angles visible.
